summary: Iteration 12 - Admin Dashboard Performance Analytics: Full backend + frontend testing. All features verified and working. Fixed 5 data-mapping bugs in AdminDashboard.js. Backend 18/18 pass. Frontend Admin panel fully functional.

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: data.categories was undefined - backend returns asset_categories not categories
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Changed data.categories to (data.asset_categories || data.categories || []) in Categories tab

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: data.total_assets was undefined - backend returns totals.assets
s.categories.map() in Stations tab would throw TypeError - station objects have no categories sub-array
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Changed to (s.categories || []).map() with empty message fallback

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: s.station_name was undefined in Stations tab - backend returns name
key={s.station_id} was undefined - backend returns _id not station_id

test_results.Backend_admin_login_200: PASS - SUP003/admin123 login returns 200 with token
test_results.Backend_admin_top_level_keys: PASS - totals, health, asset_categories, stations, reporting_officers all present
test_results.Backend_admin_health_structure: PASS - working=61, orange=5, red=8; total=74 matches totals.assets
test_results.Backend_admin_asset_categories: PASS - 10 categories with asset_type_id, asset_type_name, asset_count, working, orange, red
test_results.Backend_admin_stations_structure: PASS - 2 stations with _id, name, asset_count, pct_functional
test_results.Backend_admin_reporting_officers: PASS - 7 RO users with _id, name, employee_id
test_results.Backend_admin_available_stations: PASS - available_stations list with _id and name
test_results.Backend_admin_station_filter: PASS - station_ids param filters assets correctly
test_results.Frontend_admin_dashboard_loads: PASS - No 'Failed to load admin dashboard' toast. Shows 'Welcome back, Samrendra' with Admin badge
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_panel_opens: PASS - Panel appears with 'Supervisor Performance Analytics' heading
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_station_select: PASS - data-testid=perf-station-select shows 'All Stations' by default
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_dept_select: PASS - data-testid=perf-dept-select shows 'All Departments' by default
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_supervisor_list: PASS - data-testid=perf-supervisor-list shows 6 supervisors (Ramprakash Barla, Pragyanand, Shyam, 3 Test Supervisors)
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_station_filter: PASS - Selecting DHANBAD filters list from 6 to 3 supervisors
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_analytics_view: PASS - Ramprakash Barla analytics shows: 4 defects, 10.2h repair, 99.34% functional, 0 rejections
test_results.Frontend_admin_perf_back_btn: PASS - data-testid=perf-back-btn returns to supervisor list
test_results.Frontend_admin_categories_tab: PASS - Categories tab shows Ceiling Fan, ESCALATOR, LIFT, LIGHT, PLATFORM SURFACE etc.
test_results.Frontend_admin_stations_tab: PASS - Stations tab shows DHANBAD (73, 87.74%, 12 issues) and TEST_STATION
test_results.Frontend_admin_reporting_officers_tab: PASS - Reporting Officers tab shows Rahul, Ram, SRDEN, Sr DEEG etc.
test_results.Frontend_regression_sup_my_performance: PASS - SSE001 dashboard still has My Performance tab
test_results.Frontend_regression_sup_no_admin_btn: PASS - Performance Analytics button correctly NOT shown for supervisor role

action_items: MINOR: Stations tab collapsible shows 'No category breakdown available' because backend station objects don't include per-station category breakdown. Consider adding categories array per station in GET /api/dashboard/admin response (station_acc) if station-level category drill-down is desired.
INFO: The existing test users (Test Supervisor 1778063677/717/730) from previous testing iterations appear in the supervisor list. Consider cleanup if test data pollution is a concern.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AdminDashboard.js had 5 data-mapping mismatches with the backend response. The backend returns 'asset_categories' but frontend used 'data.categories' (TypeError). The backend returns 'totals.assets' but frontend used 'data.total_assets' (showed undefined). Station objects have no 'categories' sub-array but Stations tab called s.categories.map() (would crash on tab open). All fixed.
INFO: The GET /api/dashboard/admin endpoint is now properly implemented and returns correct response. Backend returns 74 total assets, 10 asset categories, 2 stations, 7 reporting officers.
INFO: Admin dashboard correctly shows role-scoped data. Supervisor users (SSE001) correctly do NOT see the Performance Analytics button.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Admin Performance Analytics flows working, regression passes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Performance Analytics features fully working (Iteration 12). Backend 18/18 pass. Admin dashboard loads without errors. Performance Analytics panel with station/dept filter, supervisor list, drill-down, back navigation all verified. Fixed 5 data-mapping bugs in AdminDashboard.js (asset_categories vs categories, totals.assets vs total_assets, s.categories vs s.categories||[], s.station_name vs s.name, key station_id vs _id). One minor enhancement: Stations tab collapsible doesn't show per-station category breakdown (backend doesn't return it). All previous tests (SUP/ASUP/RO performance tabs from iteration 11) still pass.
